full_text:
Ubuntu Security Notices

USN-7870-1

 

 

 

 

 

 
USN-7870-1: Freeglut vulnerabilities

 

 

 

 
Publication date

 

 

 
17 November 2025

 

 

 

 

 
Overview

 

 

 
Several security issues were fixed in Freeglut.

 

 

 

 

 
Releases

 

 

 

 25.10

 25.04

 24.04 LTS

22.04 LTS

20.04 LTS

18.04 LTS

16.04 LTS

14.04 LTS

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Open side navigation
 

 

 
Packages

 

 freeglut - Free implementation of the OpenGL Utility Toolkit (GLUT)
 

 

 
Details

 

 

It was discovered that Freeglut incorrectly managed memory, resulting in a
memory leak. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of
service.

 

 

 

It was discovered that Freeglut incorrectly managed memory, resulting in a
memory leak. An attacker could possibly use this issue to cause a denial of
service.

 

 

 

 
Update instructions

 

 

 

 

In general, a standard system update will make all the necessary changes.

 Learn more about how to get the fixes.
 

 

 

 

 
The problem can be corrected by updating your system to the following package versions:

 

 

 

 

 Ubuntu Release
 Package Version
 

 25.10

questing

 libglut-dev – 

3.4.0-5ubuntu0.1

 libglut3.12 – 

3.4.0-5ubuntu0.1

 

 25.04

plucky

3.4.0-4ubuntu0.1

 libglut3.12 – 

3.4.0-4ubuntu0.1

LTS noble

3.4.0-1ubuntu0.1~esm1

  

Ubuntu Pro
 Fix available with Ubuntu Pro via ESM Apps. A community fix might become publicly available in the future.
